description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex set within a rectangular, fenced plot featuring extensive landscaping. The house is composed of multiple interconnected brick and dark-roofed structures, with a central circular driveway and a prominent fountain at the front. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and various trees and shrubs providing privacy and greenery. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with large panes and some vertical strips, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is marked by a wide driveway, a formal gate, and a landscaped approach lined with tall, slender trees. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with flat and gable roof sections and a mix of brick and dark panel exteriors.
description: A large, modern brick house complex with multiple wings, landscaped gardens, a circular driveway with a fountain, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, fountain, main entrance, and formal landscaping with tall trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facades, multiple rooflines, and the transition from the front garden to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, patio, and lush garden areas with various trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool deck, rear patio, and the back entrances to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical rows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Wide driveway with a circular approach, central fountain, formal gate, and landscaped path lined with tall trees
